title: Creativ Company Polystyrene Balls – 25 White Foam Balls (Ø 8 cm) for Crafting, Model-Making & School Projects – 8 cm Diameter Each
features: Convenient 25‑Pack – Includes 25 identical 8 cm diameter polystyrene balls, useful for multiple craft and educational uses.
Crafts Made Easy – Great for painting, decoupage, glue, fabric gluing, floral arrangements, and school assignments.
Light & Durable – Strong yet lightweight foam balls that hold shape well—ideal for decoration or model building.
Blank Canvas Design – Smooth white surface ready for personalisation with paints, paper, wax, or mixed media.
Trusted Creativ Quality – Made by Creativ Company, known for premium creative supplies across Europe.
description: Product Description Get creative with the Creativ Company Polystyrene Balls—a versatile pack of 25 white foam spheres, each 8 cm in diameter. Lightweight yet sturdy, these smooth-surfaced balls are perfect for a range of craft, school, and decorative projects. Paint or decoupage them, incorporate into floral arrangements, or use them as whimsical bases for model-making or festive displays. The consistent size ensures uniformity in group projects, classroom assignments, or DIY decoration sets. Whether you're teaching, crafting alone, or creating for events, these polystyrene balls offer both form and function—backed by the trusted quality of Creativ Company. Safety Warning Warning: contains small parts. Not suitable for children under 3 years. Protect from children and pets safely before hanging. Box Contains Polystyrene Balls, 8 cm, 25 pc See more
